/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid84/bin/c++ -fPIC -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -fmessage-length=0 -march=nocona -mtune=haswell -ftree-vectorize -fPIC -fstack-protector-strong -fno-plt -O2 -ffunction-sections -pipe -isystem /home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/include  -I/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/targets/x86_64-linux/include -shared -Wl,-O2 -Wl,--sort-common -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,-z,relro -Wl,-z,now -Wl,--disable-new-dtags -Wl,--gc-sections -Wl,--allow-shlib-undefined -Wl,-rpath,/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib -Wl,-rpath-link,/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib -L/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/lib  -L/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/targets/x86_64-linux/lib -L/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MPIDPlugin.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libMPIDPlugin.so -o libMPIDPlugin.so CMakeFiles/MPIDPlugin.dir/openmmapi/src/MPIDForce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MPIDPlugin.dir/openmmapi/src/MPIDForceImpl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MPIDPlugin.dir/serialization/src/MPIDForceProxy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MPIDPlugin.dir/serialization/src/MPIDSerializationProxyRegistration.cpp.o   -L/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid84/lib/plugins  -Wl,-rpath,/home/am3-peichenzhong-group/miniconda3/envs/mpid84/lib/plugins: -lOpenMM
